server/tests/test_tiff_codec.py :: test_decode_tiff_rgb_solid
def test_decode_tiff_rgb_solid() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(10, 8, 50, 100, 150)
    payload = tiff_bytes(raster)
    decoded = decode_tiff(payload)
    assert decoded.width == 10
    assert decoded.height == 8
    assert decoded.data[0:3] == bytes((50, 100, 150))

server/tests/test_tiff_codec.py :: test_decode_tiff_via_formats_helper
def test_decode_tiff_via_formats_helper() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(12, 10)
    payload = tiff_bytes(raster)
    decoded = decode_image(payload, "gradient.tif")
    assert decoded.width == 12
    assert decoded.height == 10

server/tests/test_tiff_codec.py :: test_convert_tiff_to_jpeg
def test_convert_tiff_to_jpeg() -> None:
    payload = tiff_bytes(solid_raster(14, 12, 200, 80, 40))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(payload, "photo.tif")
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/jpeg", "jpg"), max_mb=1)
    assert output.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_tiff_codec.py :: test_convert_tiff_to_webp
def test_convert_tiff_to_webp() -> None:
    payload = tiff_bytes(gradient_raster(16, 12))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(payload, "gradient.tiff")
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/webp", "webp"), max_mb=1)
    assert output[8:12] == b"WEBP"
